name: Georgia Caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried black-eyed peas in 2 quarts of water overnight.
2. Drain the peas and place them in a large saucepan.
3. Add enough water to cover the peas, then bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 40 minutes over medium flame.
5. Drain the peas and pour Zesty Italian dressing over them.
6. Cool the mixture.
7. Combine the diced green pepper, finely chopped onion, diced Jalapeno peppers, sliced pimiento (drained), and minced garlic with the peas.
8. Toss everything together and refrigerate for 24 hours.
9. Serve at room temperature as a dip with tortilla chips. Makes about 7 cups.
10. For salad variation: Place the Georgia Caviar over avocado halves on a bed of lettuce.
